mapper.select:
SELECT ID, DEVICE_ID AS deviceId, RULE_ID AS ruleId, RULE_NAME AS ruleName, LEVEL AS level, METRIC AS metric, CURRENT_VALUE AS currentValue, THRESHOLD AS threshold, TRIGGERED_AT AS triggeredAt, CONFIRMED_AT AS confirmedAt, RESOLVED_AT AS resolvedAt, STATUS AS status, AI_ANALYSIS AS aiAnalysis FROM dm_alert
AND DEVICE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deviceId}, '%')
AND STATUS = #{status}
AND LEVEL = #{level}
AND TRIGGERED_AT >= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{startTime} / 1000)
AND TRIGGERED_AT <= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{endTime} / 1000)
ORDER BY TRIGGERED_AT DESC
